text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Individual Counseling * Chronic/Severe Mental Illness 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV Issues Chronic/Severe Mental Illness Hispanic/Latino Community Immigration Issues LGBTQ2+ Issues Native American Community Pregnant Individuals Veterans Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SHELTERCARE BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers specialized, wraparound behavioral health services. Services are customized for each individual and often include counseling, skills training, case management, peer support, and support with community navigation. 499 W 4th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Adults with OHP or Medicaid coverage, a diagnosis of a serious mental illness, and difficulty managing activities of daily living Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 505-5188 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SHELTERCARE BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES
